//: Type-checks the standalone shell (root-config.ts). The shell is not an Angular app, so this is a plain tsconfig — no angularCompilerOptions. It reuses the strict compiler options from the uFE's base config, and maps the @infobloxopen/* + single-spa specifiers to the packages installed under ../notes-ufe/node_modules (the example installs there via `pnpm install --ignore-workspace`). Run: `pnpm run typecheck` from this dir, or `tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit`.
